summary: Evaluator verified all 24 manifest hashes, re-ran the full installer suite (35/0) and bash -n, confirmed genuine red->green (29/6 with failures confined to the new local-env-mcp scenarios -> 31/0), line-level reviewed the MCP path (VALID_MCPS/MCP_LIST, --mcp enum validation, MCP_NODE_OK Node<20 gate with robust version parsing; placement/registration gated by SKIP_MCP/selection/NODE_OK; destination paths only from validated enum names), and confirmed via git history that Cursor/VS Code registration is T-007 scope, not T-006 creep. Verdict PASS with one Minor.

findings.description: Report's 'Output Paths And Hashes' section lists a stale install.sh SHA-256 (0ea7a63...) predating the gate-time Outputs table hash (a782bcf...) which matches the manifest-bound current file. Cosmetic inconsistency only.

note: Full evaluator output (including the checked-verifications list) is preserved in the orchestrating session transcript.
